data.title: DESIGN.md: simplify prose — reframe foundations (neutral base + house accents), introduce houses early, cut historical/scaffold cruft

data.body: COLD review of frac-224-design-md-prose. Verified: (1) git diff master...HEAD touches only DESIGN.md (+plan file) — 7 prose hunks, all at line 86+. Front-matter (lines 1-83) UNTOUCHED, confirmed first hunk starts at @@ -86. (2) No LIVE rule dropped. Story para: cream bg+charcoal text, single gold section-story #D4BA58, accent decoration-only, body stays text-foreground (gold-on-cream fails WCAG), sourced from SECTIONS.story.accent — all survived; only 'three golds' archaeology + FRAC-205 ref cut. Colors intro: 3-weight charcoal ladder (foreground/-muted/-faint), neutral fills as foreground low-opacity, accents from house palette — all survived; only shadcn token-removal sentence cut. Overview: mobile-first #1 intact; 'one scheme, no dark mode' fact preserved in foundation #2 (line 96) AND front-matter desc (line 4); houses = per-sector accent pairs introduced early (line 91) BEFORE the doc leans on the term. (3) Foundation #2 reframe matches owner intent — 'A quiet base so the houses can be loud': neutral base -> loud house accents carrying brand/sectors, base simple because of many color pops. Reads well. (4) Coherence: all FRAC-NNN parentheticals (201/205/209/214/215), 'three golds', shadcn sentence, 'that token was removed', button-accent-var rename note all removed cleanly — no dangling refs (grep clean). Both internal anchors (#non-house-section-colors L149, #components L327) resolve. (5) Gate: node scripts/design-conformance.mjs GREEN (exit 0). VERDICT: PASS.
